items.title: Tariffs ruling is major blow to Trump's second-term agenda
items.description: The Supreme Court has weakened Trump's hand in dealing with other nations, writes Anthony Zurcher.

items.title: US build-up of warships and fighter jets tracked near Iran
items.description: A second US aircraft carrier appears to be heading towards the Middle East as Washington increases its pressure on Iran.

items.title: Nasa targets early March to send humans back around the Moon
items.description: Nasa sets the launch date following a successful "wet dress rehearsal" of the Artemis II mission.

items.title: Trump tariffs ripped up global trade order. What now?
items.description: If you think the Supreme Court ruling heralds a return to pre-Trump business as usual - think again.

items.title: Dog trained to illegally dump rubbish, Italian authorities say
items.description: "Ingenuity can never become an alibi for incivility", the City of Catania warns.
